subcodes.first_line: O Manifestation of God's tests, human souls in this dust-heap of earth are of two kinds and divided [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظهر امتحانات الله نفوس بشریه در این خاکدان ترابی بر دو قسمند و مقسوم بر
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
